item.title: .Pepe - a meme frog named Web3 NFT crypto domains from Cortex.
item.description: <img src="https://blogger.googleusercontent.com/img/a/AVvXsEjU3mXhc4ZiHrqrE_c4Mi-mT-yX_pPaCThHbLV0G-m9egvpeOE8nE-9dYtnPmR0Ip2KQQfmfDqkM-fSAYXvYn1kp7hLuf5r7_ZAMTQ_6LdC7muRy3OOJjFDSbwnSGCp0DCp_OD77qSxPOZckBBhnOQiBq7SdrSUG_FfiBgX0ql9_bM18PiPpN7ZsT1EUg" alt=""> Time is super valuable thing once it passed you can’t go back unless you have working time machine which is why if you got opportunity to experience something that you wish or like it’s better to do as you may not get same in future because in this world most things changing and evolving at fast pace if you miss to grab certain things then you may regret later but yeah there are certain things which may come
